tables.agent_config: Agent network filesystem (category = directory, key = filename, value = JSON)

useful_queries.pm_state: SELECT key, value FROM agent_config WHERE category = 'pm-memory';
useful_queries.builder_inboxes: SELECT key, value FROM agent_config WHERE category = 'builder-inbox';
useful_queries.active_tasks: SELECT task_id, builder, status, assignment_seq FROM builder_tasks WHERE status IN ('assigned','in_progress','blocked') ORDER BY builder, assignment_seq;

notes.purpose: Accessibility for future sessions - security review pending
